app-pixels-style modes/apps gallery on the site
Resin + watch-case enclosure guide (docs/enclosure-resin.md)

Case v4: crown + classic orientation — DONE (body+lid+crown, watertight)
Flash unified firmware (12h/AM-PM + °F) to boards #1 (id8) + #2 (id7)
Re-render final case (bail-up) + crown on site
Wrap-up: root README, docs/BUILDING.md, render tool, refreshed memory

Mesh time sync (#1): SMOLv1 TIME frame, newest-NTP-wins (loop-free) — compile + clippy clean; 3-way mesh VERIFIED 2026-07-07 across all three boards (id8/id9 adopt id7's synced_at over ESP-NOW; adoption proven 3×, logged on issue #4)

Magical node names (#2): realm-sigil port, display-only fantasy realm — compile-verified; flashed on all three boards: id7 (ac:a7:04:b9:77:14) = 'Draconic Dominion', id8 (ac:a7:04:ba:1f:24) = 'Eldritch Nexus', id9 (10:00:3B:CE:95:CC) = 'Jade Herald'

ESP-NOW → internet relay bridge (#3): single-hop telemetry, leaf → RELAY fragments → gateway → UDP over WiFi burst. LAN UDP collector + status page COMMITTED (1943457, 19 tests); gateway firmware still hardening — an adversarial review caught a pre-ship freeze-on-failed-flush bug, now being fixed. Not done.

MMO mesh snake (#5): shared 256×256 toroidal world, scrolling viewport, 18 B SNK self-broadcast @5 Hz jittered, dead-reckoned peers, mesh leaderboard (score≡length), + six treasure-powers (Wraith Veil…Phoenix Ember, §11 durations) — ALL IN CODE + committed (6baea36 + phasing fix 877b2af, Wraith Veil phasing tested 52/52); compile-verified (3 builds, default/wifi byte-identical); hardware flash pending

Flash the mesh firmware to the fleet: id7 'Draconic Dominion' (ac:a7:04:b9:77:14, gateway) + id8 'Eldritch Nexus' (ac:a7:04:ba:1f:24, leaf) both flashed + verified today on the unified mesh firmware; mesh-time adoption proven 3× (incl. on the new firmware)

OTA firmware updates (#6): research verdict = pin-compatible path (esp-bootloader-esp-idf + esp-storage, ~M effort); UX designed — WiFi-burst fetch + rollback, and each build wears a sigil VERSION name ('Dominion v42', forge realm). Design.
Plugin/mode framework (#7): enum-delegation registry; a shared About screen absorbs the OTA flow. Design.
Bench mesh-view (#8): per-node table — magical noun, RSSI, sync state, role (gateway/leaf). Filed + being designed.
Flash board id9 'Jade Herald' (MAC 10:00:3B:CE:95:CC) for a 3-way ESP-NOW mesh — DONE 2026-07-07: all three boards flashed, 3-way mesh proven (logged on issue #4)
Wire battery + TP4056 and print/assemble the pocket-watch case
